# UserIdentity.As

**Type Alias**

An alias for [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/UserIdentityFactory] for convenience.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias As = UserIdentityFactory
```

## Getting a type eraser

- **eraseToAnyUserIdentity()**: Wraps this user identity with a type eraser.
